title: orchis × thriftiensis
intro: Orchis × thriftiensis, also known as the Man orchid, is a rare and hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orchis × thriftiensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the roots and using them in infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
